title: Shadow's Dwarfed Weapons
description: Dwarfed Weapons (alt title: One Stick) is a mod that shrinks the crafting recipes for all the tools (except for swords). It does not replace the Vanilla recipes, however, it only adds smaller secondary ones.
body:
Dwarfed tools is a mod that adds shrinked variations of all the Vanilla tool recipes. It does not replace the Vanilla recipes or shrink the tools themselves, however. This mod was inspired by [this post](https://www.reddit.com/r/PhoenixSC/comments/1fk58xh/hmmmmmmm/) by u/Note_Cubes on r/PhoenixSC.

**Dwarfed Tools is technically property of u/Note_Cubes, and as such, they decide how it may be handled and distributed.**
